name: n8n:create-community-node-lint-rule
tagline: Step-by-step guide to implement, test, register, and document a new ESLint rule in the n8n community-nodes plugin.
verdict: Concrete, example-rich procedure with a clear checklist, explicit output contract, and good context-economy (defers AST helper catalog to reference.md). Weak points: namespaced name violates kebab-case, no version/changelog signal, no explicit failure handling for the verification step, and no scope-exclusion guidance.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' guidance despite overlap with adjacent n8n:conventions skill.
Step 6 lists test/typecheck/build/lint verification commands with no stated action if any of them fails.
name: n8n:create-community-node-lint-rule — contains ':' and fails the kebab-case regex ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$.
